685000000000000000000001 note: Pay Fence, bring him useful information, and remove outsiders from Customs.
685000000000000000000001 description:
Hello, mercenary. I have been watching you for a little while. You listen, you return alive, and you do not ask too many questions. This is already more than most can manage.

There is a man in Tarkov who may have work for someone like you. Former BEAR. Old connections. Careful business. People call him Tony. He does not meet strangers, and I do not make introductions for nothing.

First, bring me proper payment. Two watches. Clean enough to pass through many hands. Then bring me something worth reading, a folder with intelligence. After that, you will do a small thing for me on Customs. Too many outsiders are moving through places where they do not belong. Remove them and come back alive.

Do this, and maybe I tell Tony your name. Fail, and there is no name worth passing along.
685000000000000000000001 acceptPlayerMes: I understand. I’ll bring what you asked for.
685000000000000000000001 startedMessageT: Good. Start with the payment. Two watches. Do not make me wait.
685000000000000000000001 changeQuestMess: Still working? People who wait too long become less interesting.
685000000000000000000001 completePlayerM: The job is done. I have what you wanted.
685000000000000000000001 successMessageT: Good. You paid, you listened, and you came back breathing. I will pass your name to Tony. What he does with it is his business.
685000000000000000000001 failMessageText: Unfortunate. Some introductions are better left unmade.
685000000000000000000011: Hand over 2 Roler Submariner gold wrist watches
